title: Flintronic Putty Scrapers Set, 6 Pack Plastic Putty Knife, Flexible Paint Scrapers Tools, Plastic Scraper Spreader for Spackling, Wallpaper, Remover Sticker, Decals, Patching (Black)
features: 【45° BEVEL DESIGN】 The head of this scraper set adopts a streamlined design, with a 45° bevel opening. The sharp edge formed by the bevel can easily insert into the bottom of stickers, glue stains or grease, reducing the number of repeated scraping. The bevel structure disperses vertical pressure, which can reduce the strength of force and make operation more labor-saving. It can also protect sensitive surfaces and avoid the risk of scratches.

【6-IN-1 MULTI-SIZE SET】This scraper set includes a black 6-piece set with six sizes of 1.5 inches, 2 inches, 3 inches, 4 inches, 6 inches and 8 inches, from narrow to wide scraper designs. These sizes can handle tasks from delicate to large-area cleaning, and you can choose according to the size required for cleaning.

【HIGH-QUALITY PP MATERIAL】The scraper set is made of high-quality PP material with a smooth surface, wear-resistant and corrosion-resistant, and will not warp or rust. PP anti-stick material, after cleaning, wipe with a damp cloth for 5 seconds and reuse, eliminating repeated rinsing. And the flexible and hard PP material prevents you from damaging the contact surface while cleaning.

【COMFORTABLE TO USE】 The handle of the scraper set has a reinforced non-slip frame, ergonomic design, comfortable grip, and can reduce hand pressure during long-term use. The front end of the scraper tool adopts a bevel design, which will make you feel more labor-saving when using it.

【WIDE APPLICATION】The scraper set is suitable for a variety of scenarios, such as oven descorching, tile seam beautification, pot descaling, non-destructive removal of car body film, interior glue residue, stripping 3D printing support, resin bubble trimming, car and mobile phone film bubble removal, scraping wallpaper, putty and walls, filling holes, repairing drywall cracks, caulking, patching, decals, etc. It is an ideal choice for your home repair and DIY projects.
description: Flintronic Putty Scrapers Set for Spackling, Wallpaper, Remover Sticker, Decals, Patching 1. High-quality materials.
